briefing.headline: Your week in markets and geopolitics.
briefing.summary: From your lens as a investor tracking markets, the desk surfaced 8 stories that matter most to your briefing. Leading threads include: Walmart to report first-quarter earnings before the bell. Here's what Wall Street expects - CNBC; Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO filing is out - Axios. Prioritize what changes decisions you own; treat the rest as peripheral scan.
briefing.editorsNote: No single story dominated your feed; pattern recognition across your interests is the value this week.
